title: trichodesma calycosum
intro: Trichodesma calycosum, also known as the "Wormseed Plant", is a small, annual herb native to tropical regions of the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Trichodesma calycosum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immune system booster. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
